repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1 panel entries define Q1 regression-basis objects, not a four-method SDiD-ASCM-MC-staggered comparison notation

published_prior_art.cite: ArkhangelskyAtheyHirshbergImbensWager2021, BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021, AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021: each supplies one method's objective/certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1.1 Q1_MinimalBasis, §1.2 Q1_StaggeredMinimalBasis, §1.4 Q1_SpectralThreshold: regression-basis and sign/spectral-weight results, not SDiD-ASCM-MC equality frontier

published_prior_art.cite: ArkhangelskyImbens2022: double-robust panel identification; not a necessary-and-sufficient SDiD-ASCM-MC-staggered equality certificate

repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1.3 Q1_SignFlip and §1.4 Q1_SpectralThreshold give Q1 bias/sign counterexamples, not first-order pairwise separation among SDiD, ASCM, MC, and staggered weighting

published_prior_art.cite: FermanPinto2021 and BenMichaelFellerRothstein2021: imperfect-fit bias and ridge ASCM, not pairwise first-order bias directions across all four functionals

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The observable kernel K_{rho,lambda} is not yet a well-defined object: C_{rho,lambda} is described verbally and the MC subgradient Z_mc can be nonunique without a specified representative or selection rule.

soundness_flags.label: Corollary low-rank perfect-span collapse
soundness_flags.one_line: The λ_mc=0 masked matrix-completion objective generally has nonunique missing treated-post completions, so the claimed reduction to a standard MC ATT functional does not follow without a rank-zero constraint or explicit tie-break.

soundness_flags.label: Proof-sketch route
soundness_flags.one_line: The sketch names nullspaces and singular-value continuity but does not give the concrete algebraic reduction that turns the nuclear-norm subgradient block and staggered off-diagonal blocks into the stated iff threshold.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define C_{rho,lambda} as explicit block matrices with dimensions, domains, and projections, and specify a unique MC subgradient representative or prove K is invariant to the representative.

Repair the perfect-span corollary by adding a positive MC tie-break, an explicit rank-zero/additive completion constraint, or a uniqueness hypothesis that actually implies the displayed MC functional is determined.
Add Arkhangelsky-Samkov Sequential SDiD as an adjacent staggered-IFE comparator and state why its oracle-OLS equivalence is orthogonal to the proposed SDiD-ASCM-MC equality frontier.

For flagship robustness, strengthen the equality clause from same ATT functional to the precise equivalence object intended: same identified functional, same identified set, or same first-order/influence-function limit.

recommended_next_step: Revise Sections 6, 9, and 10 to make the certificate and MC reduction mathematically determinate, then rerun novelty review.
